description: You are a Water Resource Specialist analyzing a consulting study timeline for the 'Enterprise Software Development Project' in ProjectLibre. Identify scheduling flexibility by creating a report for the 16 non-summary tasks (IDs 1-16). For each task, include the Name, Duration, Total Slack, and Critical status (YES if slack is 0, NO otherwise) using the format 'Task Name | Duration | Total Slack | Critical'. Include a summary line at the end listing the Critical Path Tasks. Save the report to /home/ga/Projects/critical_path_report.txt.
